headline: 暑期档预热：新片云集，经典回归
headlineEn: Summer Preheats: New Films and Classic Returns
summary: 今日无新片上映，但本周《痴迷》《福尔摩斯小姐3》等领跑趋势。多部大片如《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》即将来袭。
summaryEn: No new releases today, but this week sees hits like 'Obsession' and 'Enola Holmes 3'. Upcoming blockbusters include 'Spider-Man: Fresh New Day'.

topTrends.title: 无职转生：到了异世界就拿出真本事

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》本周趋势强劲，经典IP再掀热潮。
industryHighlights.en: 'Toy Story 5' trends strongly this week, classic IP reignites.

industryHighlights.text: 《穿普拉达的女王2》延续时尚话题，关注度攀升。
industryHighlights.en: 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' continues fashion buzz, attention rising.

industryHighlights.text: 《超级少女》新作入围本周趋势，超级英雄热度不减。
industryHighlights.en: 'Supergirl' new entry in weekly trends, superhero heat persists.

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇》等多部大片即将上映，暑期档竞争激烈。
industryHighlights.en: 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' and more big films coming, summer box office heats up.
